title: erigeron scopulinus
intro: Erigeron scopulinus, also known as Western Fleabane or Western Daisy, is a perennial herb in the daisy family that grows in the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Erigeron scopulinus include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and even help manage blood sugar levels. Erigeron scopulinus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal salves and ointments to promote healing and reduce pain.
